h7d8e2b6fgb993g4a21g91bdg88137188b568: Prisoner'll talk, yer ladyship. Spike always makes 'em talk.
h45322a70gd7fcg4d0cgbb9dg916e1860e3c5: If he doesn't, I'll cut out his tongue.
h3605a0b3g5016g4d06gbf05g4a89666bb2e8: If he don't have a tongue, he can't tell us nothin'!
h6ccaf270g640dg47f4g952cg2aeedf1771ab: The prisoner can keep his tongue - it's Spike's I'll be removing.
h385ba1afg4150g409cgbbd0g586db2495049: How many raiders do we have?
h66333df4g2365g4ac1g8e37g90ce708e9b14: Plenty of lashers, loads of hunters... and a few pariahs to carry the powder kegs.
hf0247456g801eg48bfga96fg0aac438ae3cc: These pariahs - they're prepared to fight for the Absolute?
h6a83eeafg7c7eg4fa5g920cg1a88e1436f9b: What they do ain't exactly fightin'. All they gotta do is light up their powder and burn.
h5f88db91gebc7g4546ga966g6b3cced02252: Then they're prepared to die for the Absolute. Good.
h58a49618gf17eg4c10gb38fg87ae67c68356: Dyin's the only thing they're good at.
hfacc3c83gff33g4a7ega249g86a80d8e8a63: The village to the east - it's abandoned?
h9f57f6a7g163fg4140g948bgf70917b29a0b: Looks that way. But scouts said they heard somethin' movin' around out there. Somethin' big.
h5972f75fgbf88g461bg9a83g9e350f32d1da: It's not our concern. Our prey are elsewhere.
ha622b6d8gfe39g4728gbe4eg6b69f7f50fe6: Wot are we waitin' for? Spears are sharp, the lads are all riled up an' ready!
h46972ba6g76fbg40a2g97c3g8816136cc177: You have already failed me once, and now you dare question me?
h6cea18abg931ag4820g8c88gefa8e6ab1f19: I, er... didn't mean nothin' by it, yer ladyship. Honest I didn't.
hbc7ccfd4g906dg4333g97b6g4dbd0b294029: Your life, much like your words, is meaningless, whelp. End the latter to save the former.
